user.title: Amazon Orders
user.description: Configure IMAP access for Amazon order emails

init.title: Amazon Order Options
init.description: Configure how Home Assistant tracks and processes Amazon order emails.  delivered_retention_days  - How many days should HA track delivered orders?     update_interval - how often should HA check for delivery updates?

delivered_retention_days.name: Delivered order retention (days)
delivered_retention_days.description: How long should HA keep a record of delivered items?

update_interval.name: Update interval (minutes)
update_interval.description: How often should HA check for order updates?

mark_as_read.name: Mark emails as read
mark_as_read.description: If enabled, Amazon order emails will be marked as read after processing.
